strategy: This is a 45,340-health Wallaru finale, so run it as a team: a hitter, supports who blade and Feint, and a healer to track his Krok Ankhs. He resists Balance 67%, so hit with Myth, Life, or Death (+30%).
Every few rounds he drops a random Krok Ankh (Shield, Trap, Blade, DoT, or Weakness) on himself or a wizard. These need spells or treasure cards made to clear that exact effect.
The core rule: if he is defeated while any Krok Ankh is still active, he heals to full. That revive heal is a max-percentage heal, so Doom and Gloom and Infection cannot cut it.
Enter on time. Joining late spawns extra ankhs, one per late wizard.
Clear every active Krok Ankh the round you plan to kill him, then burst him from full so the revive never fires.
cheatNotes: At round 1, round 3, then every third round, he drops a random Krok Ankh (Shield, Trap, Blade, DoT, or Weakness) on himself or a wizard.
Joining late also triggers this, once per late wizard in the same round. Enter together at the start.
Krok Ankhs only come off with spells or treasure cards made to clear that specific effect: a weakness ankh will not self-damage off, a shield ankh will not pop to a hit.
If he dies while any Krok Ankh is still active, he heals to full. Clear every active ankh the round you kill him.
That revive heal is a max-percentage heal, so Doom and Gloom and Infection cannot reduce it. Clearing the ankhs is the only counter.
